inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.noMessagesDetail: Messages will appear here when a product triggers a notification.
inbox.footer: You received this email because you have an account or pending invitation with Omnipod Discover™. © Insulet Corporation. 100 Nagog Park, Acton, MA 01720 USA.

patient-invite.subject: Your invitation to join Omnipod Discover
patient-invite.body_p2: You've been invited by {{clinicName}} to join Omnipod Discover™, a secure platform that lets your care team monitor your {{device}} therapy data.

staff-invite.subject: You've been added to {{clinicName}} on Omnipod Discover
staff-invite.body_p2: An administrator at {{clinicName}} has added you to Omnipod Discover™ as a {{role}}.
staff-invite.body_p3: If you believe this was sent in error, you can safely ignore this email.

staff-approval.subject: Your Omnipod Discover access has been approved
staff-approval.preview: Hi {{firstName}}, your access request for {{clinicName}} was approved…
staff-approval.body_p2: Your request to join {{clinicName}} on Omnipod Discover™ has been approved. You now have access as a {{role}}.

staff-rejection.subject: Update on your Omnipod Discover access request
staff-rejection.preview: Hi {{firstName}}, we wanted to follow up on your recent access request…
staff-rejection.body_p2: We wanted to let you know that your request to access Omnipod Discover™ has not been approved at this time.
staff-rejection.body_p3: If you believe this was an error, please contact your clinic administrator for assistance.

forgot-password.subject: Reset your Omnipod Discover password
forgot-password.preview: Hi {{firstName}}, we received a request to reset your password…
forgot-password.body_p2: We received a request to reset the password for your Omnipod Discover™ account.
forgot-password.body_p3: This link expires in 24 hours. If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email — your account remains secure.
